body.title: Granny: dispatch DickSimnel via bus instead of set-worker
body.result: config/granny.yaml + daemon.py _default_config(): DickSimnel.0 dispatch: set_worker → bus, mailbox: dicksimnel.0; 4 new tests + updated rules test
body.intention: I intend that Granny dispatches DickSimnel via bus envelope (same path as CC), so the new DickSimnelWorkerListener receives work.
body.description:
Granny currently dispatches DickSimnel via cc_queue.py set-worker (devices/granny/daemon.py line 88: dispatch: set_worker). The new DickSimnelWorkerListener listens on dicksimnel.0 mailbox for {kind:dispatch} envelopes. Granny must send those envelopes.

Granny already has _dispatch_bus() for this exact pattern. The only change is the worker config dict:

  OLD: 'DickSimnel.0': {'dispatch': 'set_worker', 'worker_name': 'dicksimnel'}
  NEW: 'DickSimnel.0': {'dispatch': 'bus', 'mailbox': 'dicksimnel.0'}

Note: deploy order matters. DickSimnel must be running the new listener (T-dicksimnel-worker-listener shipped) before this config flip goes live — otherwise Granny dispatches to a void and tickets sit in 'dispatched' until _escalate_stale_dispatched fires at 180s.

**Affected files:** devices/granny/daemon.py (config dict at ~line 88)
**Design rules:** bus/ owns comms routing
**Scope boundary:** IN: one config dict line change. OUT: ack/timeout handling (already exists in Granny), DickSimnel listener implementation (T-dicksimnel-worker-listener)
**Completion criteria:** test that Granny routes a builder-tier ticket to DickSimnel via _dispatch_bus (bus envelope to dicksimnel.0), not via cc_queue set-worker. Existing Granny tests all pass. Deploy-order note stamped in ticket body: wire AFTER T-dicksimnel-worker-listener is deployed.

**Deploy-order approval (stamped 2026-06-06):** Wire this config ONLY after T-dicksimnel-worker-listener is deployed and DickSimnel process restarted. Granny dispatching to dicksimnel.0 before the listener exists sends tickets into a void — they sit in 'dispatched' until _escalate_stale_dispatched fires at 180s. T-dicksimnel-worker-listener is deployed and pushed to main as of this sprint.
